svg.text: FHIR R4 API Server — Application Flow
SmartAuthGuard — JWT / SMART on FHIR scopes
HTTP Request → Express body parsing, CORS, correlation ID, audit logging
Guards → SMART JWT auth + scope check, rate limiting
Controller → Route matching, XML→JSON parsing, validation pipe, response formatting (JSON/XML)
Service → Business logic, CRUD, search with chaining/includes, event emission
Database → MongoDB (fhir_resources + history + conformance), soft delete, versioning
Events → Subscription evaluation + notification, AuditEvent creation (async, on mutations)
FHIR R4 API Server v0.8.0 — NestJS + MongoDB + fhir-validator-mx
